title: zeltnera abramsii
intro: Zeltnera abramsii, also known as Abrams' sneezeweed or mountain sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce sweating and relieve congestion, which is said to be due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, Zeltnera abramsii has been prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for respiratory issues.
